    61		xdg := t.TempDir()
    62		addrDir := filepath.Join(xdg, "ddx")
    63		if err := os.MkdirAll(addrDir, 0o700); err != nil {
    64			t.Fatalf("mkdir addr dir: %v", err)
    65		}
    66		addrPath := filepath.Join(addrDir, "server.addr")
    67		addrPayload, _ := json.Marshal(map[string]any{
    68			"url": ts.URL,
    69			"pid": os.Getpid(), // alive so ReadServerAddr accepts it
    70		})
    71		if err := os.WriteFile(addrPath, addrPayload, 0o600); err != nil {
    72			t.Fatalf("write server.addr: %v", err)
    73		}

    75		// Spawn `ddx work --once`. We deliberately pass --no-review and
    76		// a bogus harness so the worker exits quickly after emitting loop.start
    77		// + bead.claimed; the harness failure is irrelevant to this test, which
    78		// asserts only that events flowed through the probe.
    79		cmd := exec.Command(bin, "work", "--once", "--no-review",
    80			"--harness", "noop", "--poll-interval", "0", "--project", proj)
    81		cmd.Env = append(os.Environ(),

    83			"HOME="+t.TempDir(),
    84		)

    90		// least one event mirrored from the worker subprocess.
    91		logPath := filepath.Join(proj, ".ddx", "server", "worker-events.jsonl")
    92		deadline := time.Now().Add(5 * time.Second)
    93		var lines []string
    94		for time.Now().Before(deadline) {
    95			lines = readLogLines(t, logPath)
    96			if len(lines) > 0 {
    97				break
    98			}
    99			time.Sleep(50 * time.Millisecond)
   100		}
   101		if len(lines) == 0 {
   102			t.Fatalf("no worker events appeared in %s within 5s; subprocess output:\n%s", logPath, out)
   103		}

   105		// Sanity-check: at least one mirrored event should be a loop.* or
   106		// bead.* envelope identifiable by the writeLoopEvent shape (kind field
   107		// in the loggedEvent wrapper).
   108		var kinds []string
   109		for _, line := range lines {

   112			}
   113			_ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(line), &le)
   114			kinds = append(kinds, le.Kind)
   115		}

   119			if strings.HasPrefix(k, "loop.") || strings.HasPrefix(k, "bead.") {
   120				hasExpected = true
   121				break
   122			}
   123		}
   124		if !hasExpected {
   125			t.Errorf("expected at least one loop.* or bead.* event mirrored, got kinds=%v", kinds)
   126		}
   127	}

   129	// repoCLIDir walks up from this file to find the cli/ directory (which
   130	// holds go.mod). Used to build a fresh ddx binary for the integration test.
   131	func repoCLIDir(t *testing.T) string {
   132		t.Helper()
   133		wd, err := os.Getwd()
   134		if err != nil {
   135			t.Fatalf("getwd: %v", err)
   136		}
   137		dir := wd
   138		for {
   139			if _, err := os.Stat(filepath.Join(dir, "go.mod")); err == nil {
   140				return dir
   141			}
   142			parent := filepath.Dir(dir)
   143			if parent == dir {
   144				t.Fatalf("could not locate go.mod from %s", wd)
   145			}
   146			dir = parent
   147		}
   148	}

   169	func readLogLines(t *testing.T, path string) []string {
   170		t.Helper()
   171		f, err := os.Open(path)

   173			if os.IsNotExist(err) {
   174				return nil
   175			}
   176			t.Fatalf("open %s: %v", path, err)
   177		}
   178		defer f.Close()

   181		for sc.Scan() {
   182			out = append(out, sc.Text())
